text:
qmmp-0.6.1:
 * Micro update. (Several fixes done, especially for cue parsing.)

qmmp-plugin-pack-0.6.1:
 * Option FFAPASM added. (Assembler-level optimization can be disabled.)

This report contains two 'diff' files to update each
port and one shar file to add a patch for qmmp-plugin-pack.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
